title: canarium findens
intro: Canarium findens, also known as the 'Pak Kanong', is a tropical plant native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and India. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The leaves and seeds of Canarium findens have been used in herbal preparations to treat various health issues, including diarrhea, dysentery, and even snake bites. The seeds of the plant have been used to make a herbal tea, while the leaves can be used to make a decoction or a tincture for medicinal purposes.
